title: Remove authentication and create basic admin welcome page

requirements.text: Remove all Internet Identity authentication logic from the AdminLoginPage component, including the login button, authentication flow, and email verification
acceptanceCriteria: Internet Identity login button is removed from the admin page
No authentication checks occur when accessing the admin area
All Internet Identity related UI elements are removed from the admin login page

requirements.text: Transform the AdminDashboardPage into a simple welcome page displaying 'Welcome Admin' as the main heading with minimal dashboard layout

quotes: basic welcome page होगा ( "Welcome Admin" dashboard)

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays 'Welcome Admin' as the primary heading
Clean, simple dashboard layout with no complex functionality
Page is accessible without any authentication requirements

requirements.text: Update the Admin button in the ContactFooter component to navigate directly to the admin dashboard page without any authentication checks or intermediate login screen

quotes: Admin button पर click करते ही Admin page खुल जाएगा

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Admin button in the footer immediately opens the admin dashboard
No login page or authentication prompt appears
Navigation works seamlessly from any page in the application

requirements.text: Remove or bypass the admin authentication hook (useQueries checkAdminUser) that validates admin access, ensuring the admin page loads without backend permission checks
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page loads without calling backend admin verification
Page renders immediately without authentication state checks

constraints: Do not modify the backend main.mo file
Do not change the ContactFooter component structure beyond the Admin button navigation logic
Preserve all other navigation and routing functionality
nonGoals: Implementing any ABL Pulse specific features or content (deferred to next step)
Modifying the backend actor or API endpoints
Changing the design or styling of the admin page beyond basic welcome layout
